title: Forge profiler
description: Performance profiler with memory monitoring, FPS tracking, and automatic log management for Minecraft Forge.
body:
Profiler is a lightweight and user-friendly performance profiler for Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge).
It helps you monitor server/client tick times, memory usage, FPS, and world generation speed — all with simple chat commands.

Features:
  • View memory usage, FPS, and tick times in real time
  • Measure world generation time
  • Clear logs with a single command
  • Automatic log cleaning mode
  • Colorful and compact chat output
  • No mixins, pure Forge events — maximum compatibility
Commands:
  • /profiler memory — show memory usage
  • /profiler fps — show FPS
  • /profiler tick — show tick times
  • /profiler all — show all metrics at once
  • /profiler worldgen — show world generation time
  • /profiler clearlogs — clear all log files
  • /profiler nolog — toggle automatic log cleaning
Perfect for server owners, modpack creators, and anyone who wants to keep their Minecraft running smoothly!
